appName.description: Extension name displayed in store and browser.

appDescription.message: A Chrome extension that takes the hassle out of cross-posting to multiple social networks.
appDescription.description: Extension description for the store listing.

runtimeXOwnHandleMissing.message: X: cannot capture the post URL because your account handle could not be detected

runtimeXPostUrlTimeout.message: X: could not capture the post URL within 30 seconds (timeline refresh failed?)

runtimeXFirstTextareaMissing.message: X: initial text area not found

runtimeXAddButtonMissing.message: X: Add post (+) button not found for chunk $CURRENT$/$TOTAL$ (chunk $PREVIOUS$ text may not have been applied)

runtimeXTextareaTimeout.message: X: text area for chunk $CURRENT$/$TOTAL$ did not appear within 5 seconds (expected $EXPECTED$, found $FOUND$)

runtimeXPostAllButtonMissing.message: X: Post all button not found

runtimeAccountMismatch.message: $PLATFORM$: expected account ($EXPECTED$) does not match the current account ($CURRENT$). Switch the tab back to the expected account, or reopen Tutti to confirm the new account.

runtimeComposeInputMissing.message: Post editor not found. Confirm that you are signed in.

runtimeImageUnsupported.message: This platform does not support image attachments.

runtimePostButtonMissing.message: Post button not found. The social network UI may have changed and Tutti may need an update.

runtimePostButtonDisabled.message: The post is not ready to submit yet (possible causes: text limit exceeded, media still processing, or signed out).

runtimeExistingSnsTabUnavailable.message: Could not operate the existing social network tab.

runtimeSnsTabOpenFailed.message: Could not open the social network tab.

runtimeSnsPageLoadTimeout.message: The social network page timed out while loading. Check your connection and the social network status.

runtimePostUncertain.message: Tutti submitted the post action but could not confirm the resulting post. Check the social network before retrying to avoid a duplicate.

runtimeBlueskyFirstTextareaMissing.message: Bluesky: initial text area not found

runtimeBlueskyAddButtonMissing.message: Bluesky: Add post (+) button not found for chunk $CURRENT$/$TOTAL$ (chunk $PREVIOUS$ text may not have been applied)

runtimeBlueskyTextareaTimeout.message: Bluesky: text area for chunk $CURRENT$/$TOTAL$ did not appear within 5 seconds (expected $EXPECTED$, found $FOUND$)

runtimeBlueskyThreadModalOpen.message: Bluesky: compose modal did not close after submitting the thread

runtimeInstagramMediaRequired.message: Instagram requires an image or video. Text-only posts are not supported.

runtimeInstagramCreateTriggerMissing.message: Instagram: Create / New post trigger not found in the sidebar

runtimeInstagramCreateDialogMissing.message: Instagram: Create new post dialog did not appear (file input missing)

runtimeInstagramFileInputMissing.message: Instagram: file input did not appear inside the dialog

runtimeDeviantArtTitleMissing.message: DeviantArt: title input did not appear (upload failed or the UI changed)

runtimeTikTokVideoRequired.message: TikTok requires a video. Image-only web uploads are not supported.

runtimeTikTokCaptionMissing.message: TikTok: caption editor did not appear (video upload may have failed)

runtimeYouTubeVideoRequired.message: YouTube requires a video, such as an MP4 for Shorts.

runtimeYouTubeUploadButtonMissing.message: YouTube: Upload videos button not found. Confirm that Studio is open and the channel exists.

runtimeYouTubeTitleMissing.message: YouTube: title input did not appear (upload failed or the channel is missing)

runtimeYouTubeKidsRadioMissing.message: YouTube: No, it's not made for kids option not found

runtimeYouTubePublicRadioMissing.message: YouTube: Public visibility option not found

runtimeYouTubePostUrlMissing.message: YouTube: did not navigate to a listing or video URL after publishing

runtimePixivImageRequired.message: Pixiv requires an image. Text-only posts are not supported.

runtimePixivVisibilityMissing.message: Pixiv: Visible to option not found (x_restrict=$VALUE$)

runtimePixivAiTypeMissing.message: Pixiv: AI-generated work option not found (ai_type=$VALUE$)

runtimePixivAdultRadioMissing.message: Pixiv: Adult content (sexual) option not found

runtimePixivSecurityPrompt.message: Tutti: Please complete the security check in the $PLATFORM$ tab. Posting will resume automatically.

runtimePixivSecurityTimeout.message: Pixiv: security check was not completed within 5 minutes

userActionRequiredCaptcha.message: Complete the CAPTCHA in the $PLATFORM$ tab. Posting will resume automatically.

userActionRequiredConfirmation.message: Complete the confirmation in the $PLATFORM$ tab. Posting will resume automatically.

runtimeBlueskyConfirmationTimeout.message: Bluesky: confirmation was not completed within 5 minutes

runtimeStepAdvanceMissing.message: Step "$STEP$": next button not found. The social network UI may have changed.$HINT$

runtimeStepNextDomMissing.message: Step "$STEP$": next screen did not appear ($SELECTOR$)

runtimeFinalPostButtonMissing.message: Final post button not found. The social network UI may have changed.

runtimeImageAttachFailed.message: Image attachment failed. The social network UI may have changed.

runtimeTextInjectFailed.message: Text insertion failed. The social network UI may have changed.

runtimeSelectorUrlHttpsRequired.message: The URL must start with https://

runtimeSelectorJsonObjectRequired.message: The JSON value must be an object.

runtimeVideoAttachmentMissing.message: The video attachment has neither data nor dataRef.

runtimeConversionNoResponse.message: The conversion process did not respond.

runtimeVideoDurationExceeded.message: The video is too long (limit $LIMIT$s, actual $ACTUAL$s).

runtimeFileSizeExceeded.message: The file is too large (limit $LIMIT$MB, actual $ACTUAL$MB).

runtimeBlueskyThreadAutoPostOnly.message: Bluesky threads require automatic posting. Preview is unavailable.

runtimeBlueskyTabOpenFailed.message: Could not open the bsky.app tab.

runtimeBlueskySessionMissing.message: Bluesky: could not read the session from bsky.app localStorage. Confirm that you are signed in.

runtimeSnsPageNoResponse.message: The social network page did not respond. Reload the tab and try again.

failureReasonLogin.message: You may need to sign in

failureGuidanceLogin.message: Confirm that you are signed in on $PLATFORM$. Open the site in another tab, sign in, reopen the Tutti popup, and retry.

failureGuidanceAccountMismatch.message: Switch the $PLATFORM$ tab back to the original account, or reopen the popup to confirm the new account before retrying.

failureReasonCaptcha.message: A CAPTCHA is waiting for you

failureGuidanceCaptcha.message: Complete the CAPTCHA in the $PLATFORM$ tab, then retry. Tutti cannot bypass it automatically.

failureReasonMediaLimit.message: The media exceeds this social network's limit

failureGuidanceMediaLimit.message: Tutti automatically resizes images, but oversized or overly long videos are rejected. Review the video formatting setting or retry without this social network.

failureReasonTimeout.message: The request timed out or the network is unstable

failureGuidanceTimeout.message: The social network is responding slowly. Wait a few seconds and retry. If it continues, check your connection and the social network status.

failureReasonDuplicate.message: This may be a duplicate post or a rate limit

failureGuidanceDuplicate.message: The social network may have rejected a recent duplicate. Wait before retrying, or change the post text.

failureReasonSelector.message: The social network UI may have changed

failureGuidanceSelector.message: Tutti could not find the expected post form. Report this issue so the UI integration can be updated.

progressUncertain.message: Needs confirmation on the social network

mastodonHint.message: Change this if you use a Mastodon instance other than mastodon.social. You will be prompted for access permission on save.

misskeyHint.message: Change this if you use a Misskey instance other than misskey.io.

alertNeedHttps.message: Please enter a URL starting with https://

dryRunHint.message: When enabled, Tutti will fill the compose form and locate the post button, but will not click it. Useful for verifying selectors without actually posting.

autoPostFunctionDesc.message: Submits posts to each network when you click Post (OFF runs a preview without actually posting).

autoPostStateOn.message: ▶ Will post for real when you press Post.

autoPostStateOff.message: ▶ Preview mode. Opens each network's compose and stops just before Post (no actual post).

diagnosticsHint.message: If a network isn't working, paste this output into a GitHub issue.

selectorUpdateHint.message: When a network's UI changes and Tutti breaks, a JSON file at this URL can override selectors without an extension update. Use the JSON Tutti distributes, or write your own (leave blank to do nothing).

logLevelHint.message: INFO is recommended during Beta. If something misbehaves, download the captured logs and attach them to a GitHub issue.

apiSectionHint.message: When credentials are set, posts go through the official API instead of opening a tab (faster, more stable, immune to selector breakage). Credentials are stored locally in the extension and never sent to a Tutti server. Networks without credentials still use the tab-based flow.

apiBskyMissing.message: Both identifier and App Password are required

apiInstanceTokenMissing.message: Both instance URL and access token are required

betaBadgeTooltip.message: This version is Beta. If something breaks, copy the output from the popup header's Diagnose button into a GitHub issue.

retryDedupSkippedHint.message: Likely already posted — skipped re-send (a successful entry for the same content was found in the last 10 minutes of history).

reportDeduped.message: Same error already reported $N$h ago (24h cooldown).

reportEmailNote.message: Full report copied to clipboard. Paste into the email body and send.

openLoginTooltip.message: Open this network in a new tab (Tutti will detect your account once you sign in)

failureHintTooltip.message: Show why this failed and how to fix it

altTooltip.message: Image description for screen readers (sent via Bluesky / Mastodon API path)

advancedHint.message: Applies only to Mastodon / Misskey posts made through the API path (networks without an API key configured ignore these fields).

trimVideoTooltip.message: Trim the video to $N$ seconds (shortest cap among selected networks) before posting. The original file is not modified.

presetSaveTooltip.message: Save the current network selection with a name

historyRetryFailedTooltip.message: Restore the text to the editor and check the failed networks (media must be re-attached)

pixivHint.message: Default is 'general' + 'notAiGenerated' (cross-post standard). R-18 publishers / AI artists should adjust. For per-post override, switch the radios on Pixiv's compose screen before clicking Tutti's Post button — that overrides for that post only.

autoLetterboxLabel.message: Auto-letterbox landscape videos to 9:16 vertical (for TikTok / YouTube Shorts / IG Reels)

autoLetterboxHint.message: ON: when a vertical SNS is selected, landscape videos are letterboxed to 1080×1920 with a blurred background (looks better than the platform's default black bars). OFF: pass through as-is (platforms auto-crop or letterbox). Note: when ON, the same 9:16 video is sent to all selected platforms — landscape SNS (X / Bluesky etc.) will also receive the vertical variant.

historyKeepMediaLabel.message: Keep attached media in history (7-day retention)

historyKeepMediaHint.message: OFF (default): history records only text + per-platform result metadata. Local storage stays small. ON: attached images / videos are kept for 7 days in IndexedDB so you can resend a failed-only subset from history later. Storage usage grows with each post — turn off if you don't need resend.

autoOpenLabel.message: When to open the post URL

autoOpenOnIssueDesc.message: Open only when verify detects an issue (recommended)

autoOpenAlwaysDesc.message: Open the post page for every successful post

autoOpenHint.message: Choose 'on-issue' or 'always' to immediately spot silent failures (e.g. caption stripped, image missing). Note: 'always' opens one tab per platform — busy with multi-SNS posts.

errorReportHint.message: Opens GitHub Issues with recent logs prefilled.

errorDialogBody.message: Click "Report" and Tutti will open a GitHub issue with recent logs. Your post content and personal info are never sent.

constraintVideoTooLarge.message: Video file too large (max $MAX$ MB, actual $ACTUAL$ MB)

constraintImageTooLarge.message: Image $N$ too large (max $MAX$ MB, actual $ACTUAL$ MB)

displayModeAutoOption.message: auto — let Tutti pick (sidepanel → floating → popup, fallback by browser capability)

displayModePopupOption.message: popup — Chrome default (drops down under the icon; closes on tab focus change)

displayModeSidepanelOption.message: sidepanel — docked on the right (Chrome 114+; stays open until you close it)

displayModeHint.message: sidepanel / floating solve the issue where Tutti closes mid-post. After saving, the new mode applies the next time you click the extension icon. auto resolves to sidepanel on modern Chrome.

reportClipboardOverflow.message: (... full body is on the clipboard, paste it here)

uiLanguageHint.message: Override your browser's locale for Tutti's own UI. Affects the popup, side panel, and options page only; doesn't affect the social networks themselves.

historyClearAllConfirm.message: Clear all post history? This cannot be undone.

notifyInteractionsLabel.message: Notify me when my posts get replies, likes, or reposts

notifyInteractionsHint.message: Polls Bluesky, Mastodon, and Misskey every 5–60 minutes for the first 24 hours after you post (intervals stretch as posts age). OS notifications fire on new interactions. Only the 3 platforms with stable public APIs are supported in v0.5.10 — other networks may be added later.

verifyIssueCaptionMissing.message: Post text was not found in the published page (possible silent strip by the social network)

verifyIssueCaptionMismatch.message: Post text may be partially missing (sent $EXPECTED$ chars, found $ACTUAL$ chars)

verifyIssueImageMissing.message: Image was not found in the published page (possible upload failure)

historyClearAllHint.message: Removes all post history entries and saved media from this device.
